RegLoan Bank — Income / Bank Statement Verification Document VER-0002 Page 4 of 4 Statement of Account — continued Date Description Debit ($) Credit ($) Balance ($) 26/02/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 693 817 6,827 05/02/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 896 1,093 7,024 17/05/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 836 - 6,188 12/07/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 799 - 5,389 12/01/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - 2,280 7,669 14/08/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT - - 7,669 27/06/2025 UTILITY BILL - - 7,669 02/10/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT 224 1,073 8,518 24/11/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT - 980 9,498 26/01/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY - 1,325 10,823 17/11/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 493 - 10,330 27/07/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 783 1,552 11,099 19/07/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT 850 - 10,249 05/02/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT 471 - 9,778 05/08/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT 60 1,471 11,189 01/02/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 130 - 11,059 12/04/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 23 2,208 13,244 10/11/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 280 - 12,964 DTI exception
